job_desc: Let’s be #BrilliantTogetherOverviewThe role of a Client Success Account Manager is a pivotal position that focuses on delivering exceptional account and relationship management to our esteemed clients based in Australia. With a primary responsibility for client retention, the Client Success Account Manager will oversee various aspects of the post-sales process, including onboarding, training, client service, and ongoing engagement. The ultimate goal is to cultivate and nurture client relationships, thereby maximizing the renewal of existing client revenue. As an expert in our products, the Client Success Account Manager will play a vital role in providing comprehensive client training, ensuring that clients fully grasp the value and benefits offered by our solutions. By acting as a liaison between clients and internal teams, they will actively gather feedback and insights, facilitating continuous product enhancement and identifying new opportunities to further meet client needs. The ideal candidate for this position will possess a strong background in account management, along with excellent interpersonal and communication skills. A proactive approach, coupled with a deep commitment to client satisfaction, will be instrumental in excelling in this role. If you are passionate about building long-lasting client relationships, driving product value, and contributing to our ongoing growth and success, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.ResponsibilitiesAchieve allocated client renewal revenue targets.Manage post-sales onboarding, relationship management, client retention and service for Rainmaker/ISS MI productsDevelop and maintain excellent client relationships with assigned accounts and with existing and potential Rainmaker/ISS MI clients.Provide ongoing training and support to Rainmaker clients, proactively and for inbound queriesWork closely with development, data operations, research and marketing teams to provide client feedback for product enhancements.Assist the Head of Client Success with the client
